languages.text: "...Нунциус, я понимаю, что ты недолюбливаешь шумные празднества, но из уважения к Вольному Торговцу дождись завершения церемонии, молю".
"...Nuncius, I know you have no love for bustling festivities, but out of respect for the Rogue Trader, please endure until the ceremony concludes, I beg of you."
languages.original_text: "...Нунциус, я понимаю, что ты недолюбливаешь шумные празднества, но из уважения к Вольному Торговцу дождись завершения церемонии, молю".

traits.locale_text: "...Nuncius, I know you have no love for bustling festivities, but out of respect for the Rogue Trader, please endure until the ceremony concludes, I beg of you."
"...Nuncius, I know you have no love for bustling festivities, but out of respect for the Rogue Trader, please endure until the ceremony concludes, I beg of you."
"...Nuncius, I know you have no love for bustling festivities, but out of respect for the Rogue Trader, please endure until the ceremony concludes, I beg of you."
"...Nuncius, I know you have no love for bustling festivities, but out of respect for the Rogue Trader, please endure until the ceremony concludes, I beg of you."

languages.text: «... Nuncius, ya sé que no siente ningún aprecio por los festejos y el bullicio, pero, por respeto a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente, le ruego que aguante hasta que termine la ceremonia. Por favor».
languages.original_text: "...Nuncius, I know you have no love for bustling festivities, but out of respect for the Rogue Trader, please endure until the ceremony concludes, I beg of you."

traits.locale_text: «... Nuncius, ya sé que no siente ningún aprecio por los festejos y el bullicio, pero, por respeto a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente, le ruego que aguante hasta que termine la ceremonia. Por favor».

languages.text: “……努恩修斯，我知道你一向不喜欢热闹的庆典，但看在行商浪人的份上，恳请你，忍耐到仪式结束吧。”
languages.original_text: "...Nuncius, I know you have no love for bustling festivities, but out of respect for the Rogue Trader, please endure until the ceremony concludes, I beg of you."

traits.locale_text: “……努恩修斯，我知道你一向不喜欢热闹的庆典，但看在行商浪人的份上，恳请你，忍耐到仪式结束吧。”

languages.text: "... Nuncius, ich weiß, Ihr mögt keine rauschenden Festivitäten, aber ich bitte Euch, aus Respekt für {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} bis zum Ende der Zeremonie zu bleiben."
languages.original_text: "...Nuncius, I know you have no love for bustling festivities, but out of respect for the Rogue Trader, please endure until the ceremony concludes, I beg of you."

traits.locale_text: "... Nuncius, ich weiß, Ihr mögt keine rauschenden Festivitäten, aber ich bitte Euch, aus Respekt für {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} bis zum Ende der Zeremonie zu bleiben."

languages.text: « ... Nuncius, je sais que tu n'apprécies guère les mondanités, mais par respect pour {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}, je te prie de bien vouloir faire un effort le temps que la cérémonie soit terminée. »
languages.original_text: "...Nuncius, I know you have no love for bustling festivities, but out of respect for the Rogue Trader, please endure until the ceremony concludes, I beg of you."

traits.locale_text: « ... Nuncius, je sais que tu n'apprécies guère les mondanités, mais par respect pour {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}, je te prie de bien vouloir faire un effort le temps que la cérémonie soit terminée. »

languages.text: "Nuncius, şatafatlı şenlikleri sevmediğini biliyorum ama Hür Tacir'e olan saygından ötürü lütfen tören bitene kadar dayan. Rica ediyorum bak."
languages.original_text: "...Nuncius, I know you have no love for bustling festivities, but out of respect for the Rogue Trader, please endure until the ceremony concludes, I beg of you."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius, şatafatlı şenlikleri sevmediğini biliyorum ama Hür Tacir'e olan saygından ötürü lütfen tören bitene kadar dayan. Rica ediyorum bak."

languages.text: 「…ヌンシウス、賑やかな祝典を好まないことは承知していますが、ローグトレーダーへの敬意を込めて、儀式が終了するまで耐えてください。お願いです。」
languages.original_text: "...Nuncius, I know you have no love for bustling festivities, but out of respect for the Rogue Trader, please endure until the ceremony concludes, I beg of you."

traits.locale_text: 「…ヌンシウス、賑やかな祝典を好まないことは承知していますが、ローグトレーダーへの敬意を込めて、儀式が終了するまで耐えてください。お願いです。」
